title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-provider LLM workflow that chains Claude Opus for planning and integration work with Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, arguing that Gemini produces superior frontend design while Opus excels at other tasks. The workflow uses Archon, a framework for orchestrating such multi-model pipelines.
